title: GUI canvas form-submit + report formatter polish (AMBER round 7 → GREEN)
description: Round 7 closed AMBER. Backend GREEN; terminal-prompt visibility GREEN; only the canvas widget visibility and the report summary's `result=-` formatter remain. Codex's report says submitting from /travel canvas navigates back to /catalog. Diagnosis: AntD's Input.Search inside the canvas doesn't have an explicit form preventDefault wrapper, so the browser's native form-submit default takes the URL to `/`, the AuthenticatedApp's root route (line 637-645 of main.tsx) redirects authenticated admins to /catalog. The user sees /catalog and the canvas state is gone because the canvas component unmounted before saveMessages ran. The report-formatter cosmetic: when extractAgentRender finds a widget but execution.result projection is empty, the textual summary printed `result=-` even though the widget rendered fine. Claude has shipped both fixes in working tree, NOT committed: (a) wrapped Input.Search in `<form onSubmit={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); ...; }}>` so submit stays on /travel; (b) report verb's resultLine now reads `render=<type>` when extractAgentRender finds a widget, falling back to `result=<json>` only when it doesn't. tsc --noEmit clean. Cap: 1 gui PR.

files_claude_wrote.repos/gui/src/components/GatewayAssistan: modified — wrapped the Input.Search in `<form onSubmit={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (query.trim() && !submitting) onSubmit(query); }} style={{width: '100%'}}>`. Added a comment block citing the round-7 result-file diagnosis. The form's preventDefault stops the browser's native submit-to-`/` behavior. The Input.Search keeps its own onSearch prop wired to onSubmit so AntD's Send button + Enter still work. Both paths now stay on /travel.
files_claude_wrote.repos/gui/src/components/NoetlPrompt.tsx: modified — `verb === 'report'` branch's textual summary line now reads `render=<type>` when extractAgentRender finds a widget on the execution, falling back to `result=<json>` only when no render is present. Same widget-attaching behavior; just clearer summary text. Cosmetic but matches what the user actually sees in the prompt history.

context_from_amber_round_7.what_passed: render_X-as-tail design proven. execution.result.render = {type: 'app:column', args: {...}} per `noetl status <id> --json | jq '.result.render'`. Terminal prompt widgets visible inline for help, flights, locations. report command surfaces widget below textual summary.
context_from_amber_round_7.what_failed_canvas: Submitting query from /travel canvas led to /catalog. Returning to /travel showed empty chat history. Diagnosed as the AntD Input.Search not preventDefault'ing the form submit; the browser navigates to `/`; the app router's default-redirect rule (visibleMenuItems[0].path) sends admins to /catalog.
context_from_amber_round_7.what_failed_formatter: report 622795473002168855 displayed the widget below the text, but the textual summary line still printed `result=-` because the GUI's getExecution response projects execution.result as empty (the watcher uses extractAgentRender which walks events to find render, but compactJson(execution.result) sees the empty top-level result).

spec: `cd repos/gui && npm install && npx tsc --noEmit` — Claude verified locally; expect exit=0.
`cd repos/gui && npm run build`.
`cd repos/gui && git checkout -b kadyapam/canvas-form-submit-and-report-formatter`.
Stage src/components/GatewayAssistant.tsx + src/components/NoetlPrompt.tsx.

Commit using `git commit -F -` heredoc. Conventional-commits: `fix(gui): canvas form-submit preventDefault + report shows render type when widget present`. Body cites round 7 result file's two AMBER findings, explains the form preventDefault and the render=<type> formatter.
PR title: same.
Push, PR, merge. semantic-release will likely cut v1.10.x.
2_open_and_merge_gui_pr.verify: PR merged. Capture PR URL + merge SHA + new GUI release tag.

3_redeploy_gui.objective: Deploy patched GUI to local kind.
spec: Wait for GUI release tag.
`noetl exec noetl/lifecycle/bump_image --runtime local --payload '{"deployment":"gui","namespace":"noetl","image":"ghcr.io/noetl/gui:<TAG>"}'`.
kubectl rollout status deploy/gui --timeout=180s.
3_redeploy_gui.verify: GUI rollout complete on the new tag.

4_smoke_canvas_widget_visibility.objective: Confirm /travel canvas now keeps the chat + widget after submit.
spec: Navigate to /travel.
Type a flight query (e.g. 'flights from SFO to JFK on 2026-07-15 for 2 adults') and press Enter (or click Send).
Expected: stays on /travel, user message appears in chat log, then assistant message with widget below appears once the agent execution completes.
Click rerun in the widget; canvas should resubmit (run a fresh execution) and append a new chat entry.
Refresh the page (hard reload). Expected: chat history is preserved (sessionStorage) and previous widget renders.
Capture screenshot showing widget below chat bubble on /travel.
4_smoke_canvas_widget_visibility.verify: Canvas stays on /travel after submit. Widget visible below chat bubble. Refresh preserves state.

5_smoke_report_summary.objective: Confirm report command's textual summary shows render type when widget present.
spec: In the prompt: `report <execution_id>` (any recent travel execution that emitted render).
Expected: textual summary line reads `render=app:column` (or whatever the widget's type is) instead of `result=-`. Widget still renders below.
Run `report` against a non-render execution (e.g. an old execution without render) — expected: line reads `result=<json>` (the original behavior).
5_smoke_report_summary.verify: render=<type> line for render-emitting executions; result=<json> fallback otherwise.

6_smoke_terminal_regression.objective: Confirm terminal travel verb still GREEN.
spec: `travel help` / `travel flights from SFO to JFK on 2026-07-15` / `travel locations near Boston`.
All complete with widgets inline (regression check from round 6).
6_smoke_terminal_regression.verify: All three intents still complete + widget visible.

`git add repos/gui`.

7_bump_ai_meta_pointer.verify: ai-meta has a fresh local commit on top of existing 32 unpushed commits.

expected_state.description: Canvas keeps user on /travel after submit; widgets render below chat bubble. Report textual summary reads render=<type> when widget present. Terminal regression passes. ai-meta gitlink staged.
expected_state.verify_shell: set -eo pipefail; cd /Volumes/X10/projects/noetl/ai-meta; FORM_FIX=$(grep -c 'preventDefault' repos/gui/src/components/GatewayAssistant.tsx 2>/dev/null || echo 0); FORMATTER_FIX=$(grep -c 'render=\${(renderPayload as' repos/gui/src/components/NoetlPrompt.tsx 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "form_fix:$FORM_FIX formatter_fix:$FORMATTER_FIX"; if [ "$FORM_FIX" -ge 1 ] && [ "$FORMATTER_FIX" -ge 1 ]; then echo 'GOAL: CANVAS_FORM_AND_REPORT_FORMATTER_LANDED'; else echo 'GOAL: NOT_YET'; fi

result_file_instructions: Write bridge/outbox/20260509-071816-canvas-form-submit-and-report-formatter-amber-to-green.result.json. Required fields: {id, from: 'codex', to: 'claude-cowork', completed_at, overall_status, phases: {1_typecheck_and_build, 2_open_and_merge_gui_pr: {pr_url, merged_sha, gui_release_tag}, 3_redeploy_gui: {gui_tag, rollout_status}, 4_smoke_canvas_widget_visibility: {url_after_submit, chat_visible, widget_visible_below_bubble, refresh_preserves_state, rerun_button_works, screenshot}, 5_smoke_report_summary: {render_emitting_execution_summary_line, non_render_execution_summary_line}, 6_smoke_terminal_regression: {help_status, flights_status, locations_status}, 7_bump_ai_meta_pointer: {gui_sha, ai_meta_commit_local}}, regressions_found, iterations, verdict, notes, deferred_followups: ['Audit table re-add as side effect inside each render_* step', 'Gateway SSE callback re-add as side effect', 'Multi-provider keychain re-introduction', 'Phase 2 travel agent uses Amadeus MCP server internally', 'Wire hotels and activities branches', 'app:form widget for refining filters', 'Pin design rule in architecture/agent_orchestration.md: render-emitting step is the workflow tail; audit/callback are side effects']}. If verdict GREEN, append a paragraph to bridge/outbox/codex-spike-green-validation.md noting the travel agent flagship round closed GREEN.
